title: Agentic Workspace local chat checkpoint write result
description: Stdout payload emitted after writing or refreshing the ignored local chat checkpoint record.

path.description: Repo-relative ignored local checkpoint path that was written.

local_only.description: Confirms the write result describes local-only state.

items.description: One durable source recorded in the checkpoint.

durable_sources.description: Durable sources recorded in the checkpoint.

durable_source_count.description: Number of durable sources recorded in the checkpoint.

items.description: One issue reference recorded in the checkpoint.

current_issue_refs.description: Issue references recorded in the checkpoint.

items.description: One non-fatal warning about the checkpoint write.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings about the checkpoint write.

resume_rule.description: Rule for treating the checkpoint as advisory continuity state.

rule.description: Human-readable local-only and non-evidence boundary for the write result.
